title: 本地大學生發生大規模抄襲功課  2

replies.msg:
#CU0401
"ENGG1130 Lecturer請好好反省
有關Lecturer出既Email，可參考：
https:// pasteid.fledix. com/ 5vza

有數點本人想勾出
1. 不明白把本地生與非本地生作比較的用意
原文有關部份：
there are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6, some of these students seem to be too busy in hall and/or society functions. On the other hand, ALL international (including mainland, Taiwan and Macau) students write up their own answers and explain things in different ways

本地生大多是DSE制度下的產物，學習歷程、投巧、知識均依據教育局制定，而今年入學的新生在學期一僅有兩個月的大學學習，所學知識有限，故在完全HW 2方法有雷同，難度是本地生的問題嗎？

本人並不能從此Email中看出Lecturer對本地生的尊重，作為一間多元化的學校，本地生佔多數下，不明白Lecturer刻意區分本地和非本地生的意義何在。

而Lecturer所提及的society function和too busy in hall亦有冒犯之意，不明白Lecturer猜測同學抄襲原因的用意，且𣎴少個案是被Lecturer誤當作抄襲，對有關同學實屬不公。

2.不明白數學題目何以構成抄襲
原文有關部份：
There are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6

第3題問題層繪畫Equation的圖像，本人相信大部分同學有使用網上工具協助，惟不明白手繪圖形何以構成抄襲。

另數學功課被指抄襲之說法本人難以理解，不少同學花了大量時間完成卻換來零分，以中學及大學僅僅學的知識，使用方法和計算答案相同，此乃人之常情。

3.不明白為何要標註曾與同學進行討論在功課上
原文有關部份：
Whenever there is discussion involved during the process, please be reminded that YOU MUST INDICATE A PROPER ACKNOWLEDGMENT at the back of that particular problem, e.g., I have discussed with Mr. CHAN Tai Man regarding Question 4, otherwise this will be treated as “cheating” or “plagiarism” in academic world.

Lecturer看似反對同學討論功課內容，並刻意打壓進行學術討論的同學，此舉令人不解。解

4.借抄襲名義報復學生
原文：
DO NOT think that you are “innocent” if you lend your work to others for copying, you are also violating rules of “Academic Honesty”, and any related offence will lead to disciplinary action including termination of studies at the University.

為何同樣是數學course的ENGG1120並沒有任何抄襲個案，而ENGG1130卻如Lecturer所講大量抄襲，令人不解。

做功課上網找教學乃人之常情，而數學世界擁有極大量定理和方法，每一步驟確實建基於前人的努力，不明白數學功課被要求寫reference所為何事。

本人明白ENGG1130作為本年新course，不完美有改善空間乃合理，惟Lecturer不接受學生意見，且利用制度下的方法報復學生，本人深感遺憾。"

source: CUHK secrets

來龍去脈係大概個lecturer 同TA係secret俾學生開9佢波話教得差，之後就針對local學生，就捉一啲一齊做功課既學生plagiarism（本身無參與呢件事既學生都俾個lecturer 當plagiarism 處理）

冇抄，冇畀人捉，不過覺得hugo吹奏non local真係好肉酸[/quote]Assignment A
綜合上個
Assignment 1 Q9

sum n =1 to inf. 1/n^2 = 2B_0/ A_0 - 2B_n/A_n
A0 = pi/2
B0 = pi^3 / 24

sum n =1 to inf. 1/n^2 = pi^2 / 6 - 2B_n/A_n

part 兩邊take sum n = 1 to inf
左邊係telescoping series, sum n = 1 to t lim t --> oo 2(B_0/A_0 - B_t/A_t)
By(b), |B_n/A_n| <= c/|n+1| <= c/(n+1)
lim n --> oo |B_n/A_n| <= lim n --> oo c/(n+1) <=0
lim t --> oo B_t/A_t = 0



喺[0, pi/2]個interval sin x喺concave down.
所以joining (0,0) 同 個sin x local max (pi/2, 1)果條線喺個sin x graph下邊

所以2x/pi <= sin x on that interval.
y=2x/pi喺果條線嘅equation

咁你可以bound x^2 sin^n x by some constant * sin^(n+2) x

然後兩邊integrate from 0 to pi/2....

Hugo個錯嘅答案：

r+5z=0
r=-5z
r^2=(-5z)^2
r^2=25z^2
r^2-25z^2=0
x^2+y^2-25z^2=0

你可以話佢無define好r，不過喺佢無define好r嘅情況底下，好似班俾人屈抄錯答案嘅學生咁take r做non negative九成九人都會咁做。何況佢自己都Hugo自己都直接sub咗sqrt(x^2-y^2)落r度（見我上邊圈住嗰度啦）。

而且唔講r點定義，
睇返返Hugo自己soln嘅步驟，
sqrt(x^2+y^2)=-5z
然後兩邊take square
然後幅graph就包曬兩個cone
佢唔reject正數嗰邊嘅cone絕對係錯嘅。

（有人話嗰個soln可能係ta寫嘅，well咁明顯嘅錯誤都留意唔到仲要貼堂都死啦）

TLDR: point 3同hugo今次係on9

1. email
你份email咁串, 仲要針對性, 預咗俾人插, 唔抵幫

2. hugo 教學質素
冇上過你堂唔知你講成點, 不過TA抄notes加上你份手寫notes(如果你無其他notes的話), 再加上唔准問功課, 你應該讚賞你班fm識做
建議: 睇下jimmy fung溝橋lus嘅notes, 用piazza解答

3. 重點: 究竟班fm有冇抄功課
現階段, 根據你俾嘅evidence, 我睇唔出有
我唔會知道佢地有冇真係抄到, 但只要佢地話無抄, 合理疑點歸於被吿, 我會相信冇

你份功課mul cal角度唔難, 不過year 1學mul cal算深, 科大出身應該知道mul cal係year 2 fall sem
所以有成班人錯埋同一樣野唔出奇, 仲要佢地係得到咁樣嘅教學質素, 如果我係fm上網自學完點知俾人老屈plag, 我會灰到喊

Hugo, are u freaking serious????
佢地當然係寫咗相似答案所以你先會知道佢地犯咗一樣錯誤, 但佢地錯d大路basic野, 就算你放條題目入考試, 都仲會有班寫埋同一樣錯誤答案, fm 計算approach 都好正常

得個幾行就line by line, 做discrete maths proof line by line就話plag姐

本人極度反對抄功課, 如果你有更多證據話fm plag, 講出嚟或者直上committee冇必要出email同班學生糾纏, 我一樣會插到班fm飛起, 唔係咁on9抄功課俾人發現, 而係抄功課係違反學術誠信

4. hogu Q3 有冇錯
條題目冇define好r=??, 好難話死是但一方錯
elliptic cone equation x^2/a^2 + y^2/b^2 = z^2/c^2
正常係r^2 = x^2 + y^2 --> r = ±√(x^2 + y^2)

x^2 = 4 --> x=2 or x=-2
given that: x=2, then (x=2)^2=4 但不能imply (x=-2)^2=4

問題在於Q3直接出r, 咁學生將r=+√(x^2 + y^2)唔覺有問題, 而學生只畫下半部份cone無錯

hugo solution step 2有問題, 只有r = ±√(x^2 + y^2) square先會有上下cone, 不過hugo都係將r=+√(x^2 + y^2)

To hugo: 你對事物好嚴謹同執着, 應該去做research, 成就同開心會多好多, 做lecturer 只會埋沒你嘅才華

題外話: dse 學生愈嚟愈廢係事實, local engine 學生唔夠人爭都係事實

replies.msg:
搵唔番數學老師個原post
我想講你同一個topic用唔同方法得到答案可能係你有教學熱誠
但我想講DSE所以同一個諗法唔係無道理

以下係香港大學榮譽教授蕭文強係好多年有提過
佢改卷IMO有唔少隊係6個人都有接近一樣既答題方法
https://web.math.sinica.edu.tw/math_media/d374/37404.pdf
複雜如IMO, 都可以成隊一樣解法
其實同一個訓練底下用同一答案不無道理
至於係唔係line by line抄

所以唔一定係全部人都輸打贏要
可能當中有人係混水摸魚,但無辜既人一定唔少

佢sole author果份本身做既野同佢本人專業唔算好correlated, 響讀緊phd果陣submit 又冇supervisor名, 又要sub一份editor panel明顯有問題既journal上面, 明眼人都會問究竟發生左咩事。

做academia既唔係話要防咩國家既journal, 科學世界一向同現實世界差好遠。例如Soviet Bloc既數理科文章到而家都係遍地黃金, 希臘做亞美尼亞做數學都會唔錯。但係就一定唔會搵個citation得100既人嚟做editor.

#CU0401
"ENGG1130 Lecturer請好好反省
有關Lecturer出既Email，可參考：
https:// pasteid.fledix. com/ 5vza

有數點本人想勾出
1. 不明白把本地生與非本地生作比較的用意
原文有關部份：
there are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6, some of these students seem to be too busy in hall and/or society functions. On the other hand, ALL international (including mainland, Taiwan and Macau) students write up their own answers and explain things in different ways

本地生大多是DSE制度下的產物，學習歷程、投巧、知識均依據教育局制定，而今年入學的新生在學期一僅有兩個月的大學學習，所學知識有限，故在完全HW 2方法有雷同，難度是本地生的問題嗎？

本人並不能從此Email中看出Lecturer對本地生的尊重，作為一間多元化的學校，本地生佔多數下，不明白Lecturer刻意區分本地和非本地生的意義何在。

而Lecturer所提及的society function和too busy in hall亦有冒犯之意，不明白Lecturer猜測同學抄襲原因的用意，且𣎴少個案是被Lecturer誤當作抄襲，對有關同學實屬不公。

2.不明白數學題目何以構成抄襲
原文有關部份：
There are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6

第3題問題層繪畫Equation的圖像，本人相信大部分同學有使用網上工具協助，惟不明白手繪圖形何以構成抄襲。

另數學功課被指抄襲之說法本人難以理解，不少同學花了大量時間完成卻換來零分，以中學及大學僅僅學的知識，使用方法和計算答案相同，此乃人之常情。

3.不明白為何要標註曾與同學進行討論在功課上
原文有關部份：
Whenever there is discussion involved during the process, please be reminded that YOU MUST INDICATE A PROPER ACKNOWLEDGMENT at the back of that particular problem, e.g., I have discussed with Mr. CHAN Tai Man regarding Question 4, otherwise this will be treated as “cheating” or “plagiarism” in academic world.

Lecturer看似反對同學討論功課內容，並刻意打壓進行學術討論的同學，此舉令人不解。解

4.借抄襲名義報復學生
原文：
DO NOT think that you are “innocent” if you lend your work to others for copying, you are also violating rules of “Academic Honesty”, and any related offence will lead to disciplinary action including termination of studies at the University.

為何同樣是數學course的ENGG1120並沒有任何抄襲個案，而ENGG1130卻如Lecturer所講大量抄襲，令人不解。

做功課上網找教學乃人之常情，而數學世界擁有極大量定理和方法，每一步驟確實建基於前人的努力，不明白數學功課被要求寫reference所為何事。

本人明白ENGG1130作為本年新course，不完美有改善空間乃合理，惟Lecturer不接受學生意見，且利用制度下的方法報復學生，本人深感遺憾。"

全文

Dear all,

Revised syllabus of ENGG1120 ( Revised Syllabus - ENGG1120 _Linear Algebra for Engineer_ 19-20 Term 2.pdf ) is now available. Please check it out and read carefully.

As a quick snapshot, the updates of the course are briefly summarized as follows:

We will switch to onlineteaching from 17 Feb 2020 onwards until further announcement(s) and notice(s) from the university and faculty. Please refer to "Class Implementation" (from page 2) for details.
Midterm exam is cancelled. We will introduce an individual project which will carry the same weighting as original midterm exam (35% of the course assessment). To avoid of lengthy details in the revised syllabus, more details of the project will be released separately soon. Stay tuned!
Finished assignment will be submitted through Blackboard only. Email submission will generally NOT be entertained. No hardcopy will be received and accepted.
Topic 8 (Quadratic Form) will be cancelled from the revised course coverage.
Under current situation, the teaching team would like to express the appreciation for your kind understanding and cooperations of this course. We understand that there will be room for improvement especially during this period of online teaching. We welcome your comments, suggestions and feedbacks for the course. Let's join hands to have a fruitful term 2 in ENGG1120.

Best wishes,

Patrick

quote.msg:
#CU0401
"ENGG1130 Lecturer請好好反省
有關Lecturer出既Email，可參考：
https:// pasteid.fledix. com/ 5vza

有數點本人想勾出
1. 不明白把本地生與非本地生作比較的用意
原文有關部份：
there are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6, some of these students seem to be too busy in hall and/or society functions. On the other hand, ALL international (including mainland, Taiwan and Macau) students write up their own answers and explain things in different ways

本地生大多是DSE制度下的產物，學習歷程、投巧、知識均依據教育局制定，而今年入學的新生在學期一僅有兩個月的大學學習，所學知識有限，故在完全HW 2方法有雷同，難度是本地生的問題嗎？

本人並不能從此Email中看出Lecturer對本地生的尊重，作為一間多元化的學校，本地生佔多數下，不明白Lecturer刻意區分本地和非本地生的意義何在。

而Lecturer所提及的society function和too busy in hall亦有冒犯之意，不明白Lecturer猜測同學抄襲原因的用意，且𣎴少個案是被Lecturer誤當作抄襲，對有關同學實屬不公。

2.不明白數學題目何以構成抄襲
原文有關部份：
There are many local students (i.e. admitted to CUHK through HKDSE Exams) involving in “suspicious of plagiarism” cases in recent HW 2, especially for Question 3, 5 and 6

第3題問題層繪畫Equation的圖像，本人相信大部分同學有使用網上工具協助，惟不明白手繪圖形何以構成抄襲。

另數學功課被指抄襲之說法本人難以理解，不少同學花了大量時間完成卻換來零分，以中學及大學僅僅學的知識，使用方法和計算答案相同，此乃人之常情。

3.不明白為何要標註曾與同學進行討論在功課上
原文有關部份：
Whenever there is discussion involved during the process, please be reminded that YOU MUST INDICATE A PROPER ACKNOWLEDGMENT at the back of that particular problem, e.g., I have discussed with Mr. CHAN Tai Man regarding Question 4, otherwise this will be treated as “cheating” or “plagiarism” in academic world.

Lecturer看似反對同學討論功課內容，並刻意打壓進行學術討論的同學，此舉令人不解。解

4.借抄襲名義報復學生
原文：
DO NOT think that you are “innocent” if you lend your work to others for copying, you are also violating rules of “Academic Honesty”, and any related offence will lead to disciplinary action including termination of studies at the University.

為何同樣是數學course的ENGG1120並沒有任何抄襲個案，而ENGG1130卻如Lecturer所講大量抄襲，令人不解。

做功課上網找教學乃人之常情，而數學世界擁有極大量定理和方法，每一步驟確實建基於前人的努力，不明白數學功課被要求寫reference所為何事。

本人明白ENGG1130作為本年新course，不完美有改善空間乃合理，惟Lecturer不接受學生意見，且利用制度下的方法報復學生，本人深感遺憾。"

source: CUHK secrets

Let me re-emphasize the appropriate “attitude” of doing HW assignments or attempting take home worksheets/exams:
‧Please be reminded that peer discussion is actually much encouraged in university education (i.e. you can freely discuss with others and brainstorm ideas to solve problems, in particular a math problem in this course), however you ARE NOT ALLOWED TO share your own answers with any others, nor copy answers from others, no matter in exams, take home practice or HWs, provided that these components will contribute towards your final grade.
‧Each of you should write up your own answers WITHOUT copying others’ work.
‧Whenever there is discussion involved during the process, please be reminded that YOU MUST INDICATE A PROPER ACKNOWLEDGMENT at the back of that particular problem, e.g., I have discussed with Mr. CHAN Tai Man regarding Question 4, otherwise this will be treated as “cheating” or “plagiarism” in academic world. That’s why many authors of journal articles were being accused for “plagiarism”.
‧The details of “Academic Honesty in CUHK” are posted in the following link: https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/policy/academichonesty DO NOT think that you are “innocent” if you lend your work to others for copying, you are also violating rules of “Academic Honesty”, and any related offence will lead to disciplinary action including termination of studies at the University. In the past, after the cases were sent to our Disciplinary Committee Board, some students obtained a “F” grade automatically because they were caught copying others’ work in one of the HW assignments. Some students who were being caught cheating in take home exam or take home project were expelled from CUHK.
‧If you found a particular HW problem hard, and even after “peer discussion”, you still cannot work it out YOURSELF, please leave the question blank instead of copying others’ work line by line.
Moreover, some of you mentioned that due to the previously announced HW policies, you seem hesitated to seek help from instructors and TAs questions regarding HW assignments.

The instructors of ENGG 1130 received many emails and inquiries regarding the assigned handwritten assignments, for example how to solve certain problems, checking solutions or giving hints on a particular problem. In view of this situation, the instructors have reached a consensus that, except for typos or mistakes that may lead to misunderstanding, we will NOT provide any comments, feedback and suggestions for any problems in the assigned HW. This is to ensure absolute fairness to all students who have enrolled these two courses.
We will also request the TAs to follow this practice for any problems/inquires in any handwritten assignments. For WeBWorK problems in ENGG 1130, since they are NOT counting towards the final grade, if you encounter any questions in any problems, feel free to contact any TAs anytime and make appointments with them accordingly.

"#ENGG 1130
第一次出secret, 我估阿麥博士有睇post, 我唔係中大人

(sorry 我無佢咁叻我無做過lecturer)

上半段係比麥博士既

首先我既疑問係, 係唔係佢果D罪證都係份份都係都源自同一堆人
say ABC三個人係3條都係錯同一樣野
定係ABC三個第3條錯, DEF就錯第5條, 然後拼拼貼貼砌埋一齊就話好多人抄功課

我想講第2條D人錯既野係好common常犯,尤其係大家慣左中學coordinate geometry
當左r一定係x^2+y^2

跟住Q5b 有part話人地|a x b| 寫做 |a||b|sin theta刪左個theta就話人抄功課
我想講呢一D既錯唔係無跡可尋
尤其係兩個parametrization s space同t space
涉及既concept都係大學先有
(聽講你好打得, 中學已經識呢D野, 但係大部份學生包括小弟在內都係大學先學)
一般人只係會覺得既然係同一條space curve應該2枝vector中間隻角都一樣

跟住intersection 寫左做(0, -2)果度仲好笑
我相信多多少少學生有學生未習慣唔同coordinate, 以為一定要用番x y表示
呢個都係coordinate space問題
同埋佢唔係錯, 只係答左D唔係答案既野, 佢反而答左比問題多既野

以上呢3樣係綜合小弟短短既TA生涯仲都見到D學生好Common既錯
當時我會係功課寫番feedback,叫佢地check番書,而唔會一野話人抄功課
綜合以上呢3個所謂罪證我都發現學生似乎唔係好識處理唔同space之間既object
呢個已經係好值得叫你個唔識講野既TA係tutorial講番

我唔敢100%話佢地個個都無抄

yr1要佢地同yr2 pure math major既人有同等既數學程度似乎太harsh
定係你當自己教緊Math 55?
如果你咁有passion既我相信你要諗點樣幫佢地諗番岩條題目
而唔係好威威出得好難咁捉人錯處自我感覺良好

如果你覺得你教得真係有唔好既,點解唔改進下自己?
你research無可否認好出色,但我相信你係學術界,be humble都係好緊要

如果你覺得你已經教得好好無野改,咁我就真係祝你好運
對於小弟黎講,你只係一個applied佬,再威都只係applied佬
你根本唔識數學,無咩資格係度同也文也武

最多都係比番條題目0分
班professor唔會咁得閒搞呢D admin野
而且根據中大academic honesty

不過如果你份功課6條都一式一樣既可以係咁先

佢果D咩寫公式同邊個討論都要寫低之類只係佢柒左之後既兜黎架姐
大學果份academic honesty咁general一般好多野都用唔到係數學/CS之類deductive既科
以我所知UST都無要求學生要寫低同邊個討論邊條
唔知佢讀書果陣有無咁做
佢教書唔知又有無咁做, suppose citation要cite番最原始既source
佢唔係覺得calculus/space curve geometry係本書個author自己研發掛
如果無既下次上堂大家不妨叫佢講多D math history,講下係邊個數學家偉大既研究
所以我都100%佢肯定佢都係柒左拎黎兜

嚴人寬己似乎唔係為人師表所為
佢可以讀番我初中已經讀過既曾子殺豬增加自己既修養

我話你知到時你考完識做哂份卷可能都係得C range

#CU0410
"#ENGG1130

Having read the newest email by our dear lecturer which seems like an attempt in vain to justify his action of accusing several of students of plagiarizing, I would like to write to my fellow students also studying ENGG1130 this semester.

I am also a local student entering CUHK by the HKDSE exam. I have achieved reasonably good results in HKDSE Maths & M2, and got a good grade in MATH1510 in semester 1. I want to emphasize that I do not hate the course itself: multivariable calculus is an interesting topic and is definitely useful. What I want to say, though, is regarding the plagiarism accusation that our dear lecturer has made.

Before anything, I would like to share my experience in high school. Anyone studying Maths and M2 in HKDSE will know that we are very commonly taught a single method for solving a class of problems. Solving problems quickly and accurately is a skill that is required in HKDSE exam: knowing one single method for a type of question and being able to use it to solve the question quickly is one of the methods. One of the side effects of this is that many students will use the exact same method and produce an extremely similar set of steps.

I have myself read each page of our dear lecturer's email carefully, and while I cannot completely deny that there may be cases of plagiarism involved in the email, I cannot but raise my concern that many of the cases provided by our dear lecturer are fully justifiable. I will attempt to explain a few of them below.

Refer to page 2 of the slideshow. Here we see two students attempting to graph two cones from given equations. Our dear lecturer thinks that these two students produced sets of extremely similar steps, and therefore suspects the student of plagiarizing. However, if we take a closer look, we can notice a few details:

1. The two students are using two 'completely different' linear basis. As can be seen from the photo, the student on the left has his x-axis pointing into the paper, while the student on the right has his x-axis pointing out of paper. The graph to be plotted is obviously 'unique' in some sense: given the same set of axes, anyone would draw roughly the same image. (Small detail: the student on the right has drawn his cone as the answer to the 3a possibly wrongly, as the slanted height of his cone is the z-axis, which should not be the case for the correct answer.)
2. If his accusation is not related to the graph drawn, but to the steps, then more problems remain: we can analyse each step carefully. In cylindrical coordinate, using the substitution r = sqrt(x^2 + y^2) is an obvious choice. To simplify the equation after that, it is further a reasonable choice to make z the subject, if one knows that the equation represents a cone with whatever method, including using graph plotting software that is easily accessible online. For the second part, tan Φ = r/z is an equation easily found in any textbooks that include spherical coordinates. Following the same steps in part a, one would also make z as the subject. What is so suspicious about this way of thinking that makes our dear lecturer suspect that the two students are plagiarizing?

This may be one of the most obviously strange examples in the slideshow. (The accusation on page 16 is simply ridiculous.) Some, or even many examples in the slideshow are clearly plagiarism, and while they are absolutely unacceptable behaviours that may result in serious repercussions, and I hope that my fellow students would not have to rely on 'plagiarism' to complete their homework. But I do understand what most of you feel, as a student studying ENGG1130 myself. I understand that most of you are not used to such a quick pace of being introduced to new ideas and that there is not enough support to help you learn the course material smoothly. This is, however, no excuse: you still risk failing the course and having demerits in your record, which I wish none of you would suffer from such consequences because of such a course.

However, these problems will not only occur in this course. It may, and is quite likely to occur in courses that you study in your future. I have some suggestions for you to make your studying easier, for a course which you have no choice but to study but is encountering difficulties when doing so.

First, you should make use of the course materials that are readily available online. One of the most useful materials you could make use of for this course is probably the MIT OpenCourseWare, containing videos of lectures by MIT professors. A simple google search like ""Multivariable Calculus MIT OCW"" will result in many useful materials that make your life simpler. Remember, your time is precious: if you find the lecture given by the lecturer 'not suitable for your own style and pace of studying', skipping lectures and studying yourself with materials you can find is a reasonable method, if you can have enough motivation to keep yourself doing so - however, given the quality of lectures and the need to pass this course to enter your preferred major, I believe that this should be enough motivation for you to do so. (Also, lots of thanks to our dear lecturer for having recommended textbooks: obtain the textbook in whatever way it takes and reading it, solving problems on the way, is also a reasonable method of studying.)

Second, if there are things you don't understand while studying, ask other people. You can ask your friends studying in Mathematics major, though the questions may be so troublesome and indirect that even they will not be able to solve them. Many problems that you don't understand will likely already have videos where people explain them more clearly than your lecturer can ever do: a smart student capable of entering CUHK will surely know which way to go. You can also ask your TA through email, and if they won't give hints, ask them in person, and if they still won't give hints, well, then you are out of luck.

Finally, regarding homework, try to write your own solution without doing any copying. Don't look at other's solution before you finish writing your own: you won't be able to fully forget it. You may want to discuss the way of doing the question, but you will not want to look at other's solution even once. The same naming of variables or the same steps may cause your lecturer to think that you are involved in plagiarism.

I would like to take this opportunity to encourage every one of you to ask about the academic honesty policy of this course. Ask through email what you need to do in order to correctly show what material you have referenced or whom you have discussed with. Remember that you need to follow the CUHK guide for Honesty in Academic Works (https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/policy/academichonesty/) at all times, which can result in serious repercussions if you fail to follow them. Remember, ask by email if you have anything that you feel is unclear, no matter how small it is: it leaves trails that you can use as proof. If you don't know whether you need to mark down the name of the student you have discussed with, ask; if you don't know the format of attribution, ask; if you don't know whether you should write down which book or website you referenced, ask; ask until you are sure that you will not be accused of plagiarism, or in the worst case, when you are accused of it, you have enough proof to prove yourself innocent.

I am writing this post not to point out how ridiculous the accusations are, or how unuseful the lectures are. I am here to tell everyone not to give up this subject. (Of course, you cannot really give it up or you risk not being able to choose your engineering major.) After all, ""Multivariable Calculus is one of the hardest courses that you will have to undergo in your undergraduate studies"" (our dear lecturer, Issues of ""Suspected Plagiarism"", Revised HW Policies and Final Warning, 2020), and I am sure all of you understand where most the part of the difficulty comes from. I hope that this can at least give you a little support in your hard fight through ENGG1130.

However, this course is actually quite useful, although it depends on which major you are studying in the future. It should also not be this much suffering studying this course. I wish that every one of you will find the most suitable way of studying for this course, learn something from it, have a taste of what poor experience you can have in your university life, and I sincerely hope that this will be no worse course experience throughout your years in CUHK.

There is a question I would like to ask the more experienced students in CUHK: the use of the phrase ""WHAT A COINCIDENCE!?"" is seen throughout the entire slideshow. I, as a student of the course, find the lecturer quite aggressive. To whom in the administration of Engineering faculty or the university should we raise such concern?

Finally, I must admit that I am not very familiar with the course, the procedures and what to expect from a university course. I would be glad if anyone reading this post could kindly point out my mistake, and so there would be constructive discussions so we can all have reasonable expectations."

真心我由上個post開始已經唔係針對Hugo嚟講，我其實係針對緊在座各位話學生抄個錯答案嘅巴打。

Hugo個錯嘅答案：

r+5z=0
r=-5z
r^2=(-5z)^2
r^2=25z^2
r^2-25z^2=0
x^2+y^2-25z^2=0

你可以話佢無define好r，不過喺佢無define好r嘅情況底下，好似班俾人屈抄錯答案嘅學生咁take r做non negative九成九人都會咁做。何況佢自己都Hugo自己都直接sub咗sqrt(x^2-y^2)落r度（見我上邊圈住嗰度啦）。

而且唔講r點定義，
睇返返Hugo自己soln嘅步驟，
sqrt(x^2+y^2)=-5z
然後兩邊take square
然後幅graph就包曬兩個cone
佢唔reject正數嗰邊嘅cone絕對係錯嘅。

（有人話嗰個soln可能係ta寫嘅，well咁明顯嘅錯誤都留意唔到仲要貼堂都死啦）

replies.msg: 起佢容乜易

2 月 14 日《城寨》節目中，前中央政策組成員劉細良狠狠地批評社福機構，當中的說話發人深省，亦反映到香港崩壞到一個極點。之前的節目，劉細良批評部份社福機構，坐擁大量盈餘，在這危難關頭，仍像隋文帝一樣孤寒成性，現時疫情嚴重，仍不花分文購買應急物資予服務對象。其中紅十字會贊助的機構，寫信向劉細良索取消毒用品，按情理上，《城寨》根本不用補貼這些大白象機構。劉細良仍然以人道先行，分發部份物資予該紅十字會轄下機構。可是，劉細良之後收到紅十字會公關部私訊，沒有姓名、沒有職銜，內容是說紅十字會沒有向他索取清潔用品，要求他刪除該集內容。首先，紅十字會總會的確沒有向劉細良索取用品，但他轄下的機構與他們無關？按他們的非典型人類邏輯，北京樓並不屬於美心集團。連這樣的公關 ABC 問題也未攪清楚，就以私訊形式向《城寨》施壓，這樣的關公災難，實在令人搖頭嘆息。我們的捐款，就是給這些人出糧，你還會捐款嗎？

在國難當前，《城寨》艱苦經營下，仍可以號召到不少人捐贈物資予有需要人士，紅十字會，你們過去一個月替香港人做過甚麼？刻薄點說，在乞兒兜攞飯食完，仲要洗銅銀夾大聲，這是甚麼的世界？當醫護面臨壓力，社總與一眾同路組織，發起社工一人捐一天薪金予醫護罷工基金，各大社福界頭目，就如劉細良所說，自反送中開始，就沉默得令人害怕。當一班保皇黨議員落選後，得到港共的政治公援，繼續美化極權港共。這班所謂的社福界社會良心，就像早年的中學會考中文作文試題，選擇了「適當的沉默」。危難當前退到人群之後，到疫情過後歌功頌德，你們的薪金也不過是政治公援而已。港澳辦主任換上夏寶龍，奶共牧師管浩鳴可以有勇氣問他為何強拆十字架嗎？不過對管浩鳴來說，維護夏寶龍，較維護夏其龍神父更重要。當專業失去了初心、制度失去了民心、官員失去了良心，香港怎能不走在覆亡之路。

我認為有必要mark底啲coincidence
因為我真係好感動
估唔到人生在世係有咁多coincidence

Coincidence1: 40多名被指控抄襲者皆為local
(佢自己講嘅，居然一個nonlocal都冇，令人誤會佢針對local )
Coincidence2 : local曾經上網屌9個lecturer廢，然後依家HW2 lecturer就捉人啦，捉嘅人皆為local
(令人誤會佢想報復)
Coincidence3:該lecturer嘅note同另一個唔係佢任教course嘅note不約而同地一樣。
(令人誤會佢未問過同事就抄人note)
Coincidence4: 該lecturer嘅assignment同某啲書嘅題目撞左 ，但佢冇落citation
(令人誤會佢抄人諗出嚟嘅題目)
Coincidence5:當連登講起sample時，真係搞左份抄襲sample，可惜樣本太少，而且是否抄襲值得商榷，大部分人主觀認為唔係抄。
(令人誤會佢係mon post 狗)
Coincidence6:遲遲唔公開全部sample，透明度低。
（令人誤會佢對local nonlocal有不同的指控標準)
Coincidence7: 歧視完local，之後再send email話要amend
（令人誤會佢唔想承認自己歧視)
Coincidence8: 在抄襲sample中，態度好串，卻被網友發現當中有題目的要求不清，嫌疑同學的答案可以算正確。令被他指出抄襲錯誤方法的同學為他感到尷尬
（令人誤會佢係嚟搞笑嘅)

fact abt the lecturer
fact1:直接標籤DSE入中大嘅本地學生抄襲
fact2:寬己嚴人
fact3:態度好串
fact4: discussion如果唔cite 都當抄襲
fact5: 功課唔識唔比問 ,因為唔公平
